goal: Verify and close the strict venv/Corepack m1-smoke bootstrap path after the reported toolchain mismatch, without changing release readiness or inventing evidence.
head: a620943
blocked_scope: Changing product runtime behavior, FE workflow behavior, API contracts, schemas other than regenerated openapi output, mock data, model catalog, verifier acceptance criteria, or release readiness
Inventing real adapter, endpoint, Docker, benchmark, package, export, or release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Editing docs/reviews/M6 to GO or weakening any no-fake evidence gate
Committing model weights, adapter artifacts, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or generated venv content
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may rerun the existing strict bootstrap m1-smoke command, preserve or update its generated verification artifacts, update LLM handoff docs, and only touch bootstrap tooling if the mismatch is reproducible and needs a scoped fix.
required_commands: rg -n -- "toolchain versions OK|toolchain_report|m1-smoke|strict bootstrap|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint|release_claimed_go" docs/WORKING.md docs/plans/2026-05-09_COMPLETION_LOG.md .codex/tasks/current.json artifacts/review/toolchain_report.json
required_evidence: The exact hook-reported bootstrap command passes or any remaining mismatch is captured with actionable diagnostics.
toolchain_report.json records strict=true and passing Node, pnpm, Python 3.11.x, Rust, and SQLite checks.
m1-smoke runs through the repo-local .venv Python and /tmp/corepack Corepack path.
No release GO is claimed and real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint remains the active release blocker.

executed_verification_commands.result: passed: toolchain versions OK; tests/smoke/test_m1_smoke.py 1 passed with 3 FastAPI deprecation warnings

executed_verification_commands.command: rg -n -- "toolchain versions OK|toolchain_report|m1-smoke|strict bootstrap|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint|release_claimed_go" docs/WORKING.md docs/plans/2026-05-09_COMPLETION_LOG.md .codex/tasks/current.json artifacts/review/toolchain_report.json

pip_audit_cuda.reason: skip-install environment could not complete pip-audit upgrade; run without --skip-install for required network-backed audit

warnings: This phase verifies the development environment path only.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Reproduce the hook-reported strict bootstrap m1-smoke command on current HEAD using .venv and /tmp/corepack.
phase_notes.audit: Current toolchain_report.json already shows strict=true with all checks true, but the hook-reported command must be rerun as authoritative evidence.
phase_notes.build: Run the existing bootstrap command first; only patch bootstrap tooling if the mismatch reproduces and has a scoped root cause.
phase_notes.check: Validate JSON artifacts, evidence strings, and git diff hygiene.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this environment verification phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Strict bootstrap m1-smoke verification and any narrowly required bootstrap-tooling fix; generated verification artifacts and LLM docs only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/adapter/Docker/endpoint/bundle artifacts, no evidence-policy weakening.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
